articles.title: Teen boys' rape sentences to be reviewed by government
articles.description: The three teenagers were not given custodial sentences for their roles in the rape of two girls.

articles.title: Foden, Palmer, Alexander-Arnold to miss World Cup
articles.description: Phil Foden, Cole Palmer and Trent Alexander-Arnold have not been included in Thomas Tuchel's 26-man England squad for this summer's World Cup.

articles.title: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
articles.description: The rare species of Ebola involved - known as Bundibugyo - kills around a third of those infected and has no proven vaccine yet.

articles.title: Rubio tries to reassure Nato allies over US troop deployments
articles.description: President Donald Trump says he wants to send more troops to Poland, a week after his officials cancelled a similar deployment.
